title: streptanthus lasiophyllus var. inalienus
intro: Streptanthus lasiophyllus var. inalienus, also known as Inland or California jewelflower, is a rare, endemic plant species native to the central coast of California in the United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Streptanthus lasiophyllus var. inalienus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
